commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f084c17249a51b478fee5a2e0dddc0894ed8a4e2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude CLI `settings.json` `apiKeyHelper` as a shared Claude credential source, maps it to Anthropic synthetic auth through a non-secret marker, skips helper-backed migration profile persistence, updates doctor labeling, and adds regression/manifest marker coverage.

PR surface: Source +64, Tests +77. Total +141 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: Linux with `settings.json` `apiKeyHelper` and no `.claude/.credentials.json` makes the shared reader return null, so Anthropic synthetic auth can fail before session spawn.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer/contributor follow-up for real behavior proof, canonical PR selection, and auth-surface blockers; this is not a safe automation-only lane while contributor-environment proof remains missing.

target.title: fix(anthropic): accept Claude CLI apiKeyHelper auth
target.body:
﻿Fixes #97489

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users running Anthropic models through the Claude CLI backend would hit `missing-provider-auth` before `claude` was spawned when their Claude Code auth came from `~/.claude/settings.json` `apiKeyHelper` instead of macOS Keychain or `~/.claude/.credentials.json`.

## Why This Change Was Made

Claude Code documents `apiKeyHelper` as a supported CLI credential source for dynamic credentials, so OpenClaw now treats a non-empty `apiKeyHelper` setting as Claude CLI-managed auth evidence in the shared Claude CLI credential reader. The Anthropic `claude-cli` synthetic auth path uses a non-secret marker for that credential shape; the marker is registered in the bundled Anthropic manifest so generic auth paths do not treat it as plaintext API-key material. OpenClaw does not execute the helper, persist helper output, or expose the marker through generic Anthropic API auth profiles.

## User Impact

Users with proxy, vault, or rotating-key Claude CLI setups can start OpenClaw turns through `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"` without creating a dummy `.credentials.json` file just to satisfy OpenClaw's pre-spawn auth check.

## Evidence

- Source contract checked: Claude Code docs list `apiKeyHelper` as a custom credential script and include it in authentication precedence: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/iam#credential-management
- Addressed ClawSweeper finding: registered `openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper` in `extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json` `nonSecretAuthMarkers` and added marker coverage in `src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts`.
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/anthropic/cli-constants.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-shared.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts`
- `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json','utf8')); console.log('json ok')"` -> `json ok`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/anthropic/cli-constants.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts extensions/anthropic/cli-shared.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/anthropic/openclaw.plugin.json src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.ts extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsx -e "void (async () => { await import('./src/agents/cli-credentials.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/register.runtime.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/provider-discovery.ts'); await import('./extensions/anthropic/cli-migration.ts'); await import('./src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.ts'); console.log('import smoke ok'); })()"` -> `import smoke ok`
- `pnpm exec tsx -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import os from 'node:os'; import path from 'node:path'; import { readClaudeCliCredentialsCached, resetCliCredentialCachesForTest } from './src/agents/cli-credentials.ts'; const home=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'openclaw-helper-smoke-')); fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,'.claude'),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,'.claude','settings.json'), JSON.stringify({apiKeyHelper:'printf token'})); const cred=readClaudeCliCredentialsCached({homeDir:home, platform:'linux', allowKeychainPrompt:false, ttlMs:0, execSync:()=>{ throw new Error('should not execute'); }}); console.log(JSON.stringify(cred)); resetCliCredentialCachesForTest(); fs.rmSync(home,{recursive:true,force:true});"` -> `{"type":"api_key_helper","provider":"anthropic"}`
- `pnpm exec tsx -e "import { isNonSecretApiKeyMarker, listKnownNonSecretApiKeyMarkers } from './src/agents/model-auth-markers.ts'; const marker='openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper'; console.log(JSON.stringify({recognized:isNonSecretApiKeyMarker(marker), listed:listKnownNonSecretApiKeyMarkers().includes(marker)}));"` -> `{"recognized":true,"listed":true}`
- `pnpm exec tsx -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import os from 'node:os'; import path from 'node:path'; void (async()=>{ const home=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'openclaw-helper-gate-')); try { fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,'.claude'),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,'.claude','settings.json'), JSON.stringify({apiKeyHelper:path.join(home,'helper.sh')})); delete process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; delete process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_OLD; delete process.env.ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_TOKEN; delete process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN; process.env.HOME=home; process.env.USERPROFILE=home; process.env.OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=path.join(home,'.openclaw'); const { resetCliCredentialCachesForTest } = await import('./src/agents/cli-credentials.ts'); resetCliCredentialCachesForTest(); const { resolveApiKeyForProvider } = await import('./src/agents/model-auth.ts'); const resolved=await resolveApiKeyForProvider({provider:'claude-cli', cfg:{}, store:{version:1, profiles:{}}}); console.log(JSON.stringify({apiKey:resolved.apiKey, source:resolved.source, mode:resolved.mode, profileId:resolved.profileId ?? null, credentialsFile:fs.existsSync(path.join(home,'.claude','.credentials.json'))})); } finally { fs.rmSync(home,{recursive:true,force:true}); } })();"` -> `{"apiKey":"openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper","source":"Claude CLI apiKeyHelper","mode":"api-key","profileId":null,"credentialsFile":false}`

Attempted but did not complete in this Windows worktree:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts --reporter=verbose` stopped after no output for more than 2 minutes.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=verbose` stopped after no output for more than 1 minute.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=dot` stopped after no output for more than 1 minute.
- `pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1` stopped after several minutes in repeated rolldown plugin timing output without test results.
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test` stopped after more than 2 minutes with no progress beyond the startup line.
target.author: lzy3538

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
